title: Sources: Colts seeking to trade away CB Moore
content: The Colts and Kenny Moore II have agreed to seek a trade to find the veteran cornerback a new team, sources told ESPN.

title: Sources: Heat to waive embattled guard Rozier
content: Miami guard Terry Rozier, who has been on leave since October amid a sports gambling probe, will be waived by the Heat on Friday, sources tell ESPN.

title: Frustrated McIntyre flips off green at Masters
content: Scotland's Robert MacIntyre could face disciplinary action at the Masters after he was caught making a middle finger gesture during a quadruple bogey.

title: 10-time All-Star Ogwumike returning to Sparks
content: Ten-time WNBA All-Star and 2016 MVP Nneka Ogwumike intends to re-sign with the Los Angeles Sparks, her sister Chiney Ogwumike posted on social media on Friday

title: Denver wins in 2OT, gets Wisc. in Frozen Four final
content: In a double-overtime classic, Denver's Kent Anderson scored the winning goal to stun Michigan 4-3 and send the Pioneers to Saturday's Frozen Four title game against Wisconsin.

title: Tatum clears hurdle, happy to exit MSG on '2 feet'
content: Jayson Tatum had 24 points, 13 rebounds and eight assists in 40 minutes Thursday night but, more importantly, walked "off the floor on my own two feet."

title: Sources: Aces agree to $1.19M deal with Young
content: The Aces are finalizing an agreement for four-time All-Star guard Jackie Young to return to Las Vegas, sources told ESPN on Thursday.

title: Source: Cincinnati looking into move for Neymar
content: Neymar has emerged as the latest global soccer icon to draw interest from MLS, as FC Cincinnati has begun exploring options to bring the Santos star to the United States, a source told ESPN's Nathalia Ferrão.

title: Everything we're hearing this week on the NFL draft: Jets' No. 2 pick plans, bold predictions
content: Where are the Jets leaning on the No. 2 pick? Could Jacob Rodriguez sneak into Round 1? Our NFL draft experts weigh in with their newest intel.

title: Miller's final draft rankings: Let's stack the 482 best prospects
content: Matt Miller has finalized his rankings for the 2026 draft, listing top players and providing grades for each one.

title: Free agency turns 50: Ranking the best -- and worst -- signings in MLB history
content: The first free agent contract ever was signed 50 years ago today. We rate the 8,340 deals of the past half-century.

title: NBA postseason intel: Six big questions we're watching right now
content: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six storylines that could define the postseason.

title: NHL Power Rankings: Updated 1-32 poll, each team's key free agent this summer
content: Here's how the teams stack up with less than a week to go in 2025-26 -- plus a look ahead to the offseason signing period.

content: The NHL calendar takes a break, so here's an update on all the races between two stacked days on the schedule.

content: Can UCLA make history and have all six seniors -- who scored all of the team's points at the Final Four -- drafted in the WNBA?

content: Will Lauren Betts, Awa Fam, Azzi Fudd or Olivia Miles go No. 1, and which transfers boosted their draft stock?

content: From best fadeaway to the MVP, Dean Oliver uses ESPN Analytics' Net Points metric to wrap up the season by handing out awards.

content: Surrounded by All-Stars, a 27-year-old in just his second full season is making his mark in the Bronx.

content: Teams with championship hopes fall down our list while unexpected contenders have made surprise starts.

title: Amid his 20th 30-goal campaign, Alex Ovechkin's future is unclear
content: The Great 8's contract is up after this season, but he sure isn't playing as someone on the edge of retirement.

title: Is failing to qualify for the Champions League actually better for Premier League teams?
content: The UEFA Champions League is the pinnacle of club soccer, but maybe for Premier League teams, it's just an extra headache?

content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

title: Baldwin best catcher? Alcantara is back? Cam Smith a top-50 bat? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Why the UFL plans to expand in 2028 and believes Oklahoma City is a great fit
content: UFL co-owner Mike Repole promised expansion; the other city to join with OKC for 2028 is still to be determined.

title: Max Verstappen's inner circle is unravelling -- and so are Red Bull's hopes of keeping him
content: The departure of Max Verstappen's longtime race engineer Gianpiero Lambiase will add fuel to the inferno that is building over the four-time world champion's immediate F1 future, writes ESPN's Nate Saunders.

title: UFC 327 expert picks: How can Procházka reclaim the light heavyweight title?
content: Can Carlos Ulberg upset Jiří Procházka? Three MMA experts pick Saturday's UFC light heavyweight title fight.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal look to raise £100m from double exit
content: Myles Lewis-Skelly and Ethan Nwaneri are among five players who could be allowed to leave Arsenal. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: 'Don't play us': US VP Vance warns Iran as he heads to Pakistan for talks
content: US Vice President JD Vance issued a stern warning to Iran, "don't play us," as he departed for Pakistan to lead crucial negotiations aimed at ending weeks of Middle East conflict. Vance emphasized that if Iran negotiates in good faith, the US will extend an open hand, but warned against attempts to deceive the negotiating team.

title: Mathura tragedy: 10 dead, several missing after tourist boat capsizes in Yamuna; rescue ops on
content: Tragedy struck Mathura's Yamuna River as a boat carrying devotees capsized near Kesi Ghat. At least six lives were lost in the unfortunate incident that occurred Friday afternoon. Around 30 individuals were on two boats when one suddenly sank. Rescue efforts are actively ongoing to locate those still missing, with several already brought to safety.

title: $2 tn wipeout to emergency meeting: Anthropic’s AI becomes Wall Street’s biggest headache
content: US Treasury Secretary and Federal Reserve Chair urgently met with top bank CEOs to discuss Anthropic's new AI model, Claude Mythos Preview. This powerful AI can find software vulnerabilities, raising cybersecurity concerns for the financial system. Anthropic launched Project Glasswing to proactively fix flaws before attackers exploit them.

title: 'Could be this year or .... ': Kumble on Sooryavanshi's India chances
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's stellar IPL performances have ignited widespread debate about his imminent India debut. However, spin legend Anil Kumble advises against rushing the 15-year-old, emphasizing that time is on his side. Kumble believes Sooryavanshi is doing all the right things and will remain on selectors' radar, with his debut likely in the coming years.

title: 'Grave consequences': Kharge says Centre's women quota move violates poll code
content: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge voiced concerns over the government's proposed women's reservation law amendments and seat expansion, potentially violating the Model Code of Conduct. He asserted opposition unity and questioned the special Parliament session's timing, alleging political motives. The party emphasized deep deliberation on delimitation and women's empowerment.

title: Two years after Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s ‘Code Red’, Satya Nadella orders AI overhaul
content: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has initiated a 'Copilot code red' to enhance AI performance and user experience, aiming to boost investor confidence amidst intense competition.  The company is allocating significant cloud capacity to Copilot development, with analysts suggesting Azure can still exceed expectations due to growing demand and pricing.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' collection: Ranveer's film eyes Rs 1,050 crore
content: Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' continues its impressive box office run, entering its fourth week and surpassing Rs 1050 crore in India. The Ranveer Singh starrer has maintained strong collections despite the IPL, with day 23 earnings pushing its net total to Rs 1,051.06 crore.

title: LSG or GT? Sara Tendulkar's reaction to pap's question goes viral - Watch
content: Sara Tendulkar went viral after smiling and staying silent when asked which team she supports ahead of LSG vs GT. Her reaction may relate to brother Arjun Tendulkar, now with LSG. The young all-rounder, son of Sachin Tendulkar, is yet to get many chances but remains a promising talent this IPL season.

title: Watch: India unleashes Apache's fury; Army's deadliest chopper dominates Brahmastra
content: India's Army unveiled its formidable AH-64E Apache attack helicopters at Exercise Brahmastra, showcasing their advanced combat capabilities. These state-of-the-art machines demonstrated precision strikes and seamless coordination with ground forces, highlighting their role in modern warfare. Deployed in Jodhpur, the Apaches are now a key asset for national security.

title: Salesforce CEO on AI agent that Sam Altman spent billions on: It cannot be trusted
content: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff finds OpenClaw, the viral AI agent, powerful but lacking enterprise-grade trust and security. Despite its impressive capabilities, Benioff believes it's not suitable for business use, prompting Salesforce to develop its own secure AI agents. This contrasts with OpenAI's reported acquisition of OpenClaw's creator, Peter Steinberger, aiming for broader accessibility.

title: RR vs RCB: What is the cut-off time for a five-over IPL 2026 match?
content: Rain delayed the toss in the RR vs RCB IPL 2026 match in Guwahati, though a shortened game remains possible with a 10:56 PM cut-off. According to multiple reports, the city saw low buzz due to elections, but fans still turned up for Virat Kohli and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Both teams, in strong form, are battling for the top spot in this crucial clash.

title: 'We have got to get this kid': How LSG unearthed Mukul Choudhary
content: Mukul Choudhary made a stunning IPL debut with an unbeaten 54 off 27 balls. His powerful hitting secured a thrilling three-wicket victory for Lucknow Super Giants against KKR. Coach Justin Langer praised Choudhary's athleticism and sharp cricketing mind. This close win provides a significant morale boost for the team early in the season.

title: More women in jobs: How pro-active are they in financial and tax planning?
content: Women are actively investing in India, moving beyond traditional savings. While participation in mutual funds and equities is rising, independent control over financial decisions, particularly tax planning, is still developing. Younger women show greater comfort with digital platforms and goal-based investing. This shift signifies a growing financial awareness and engagement across the nation.

title: Mukul Choudhary's untold story: Jail, loans & sacrifice - A father’s 3.5 cr gamble
content: On Friday, Mukul Choudhary became an overnight sensation in the IPL, smashing an unbeaten 27-ball 54, including seven massive sixes, to help Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) pull off a heist against Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) at the iconic Eden Gardens. The 21-year-old was bought by LSG for Rs 2.60 crore.

title: Spy ring busted, 10 held: How Pak was keeping real-time eye on Delhi's critical areas
content: Delhi Police have dismantled a Pakistan ISI-backed spy ring. Ten operatives were arrested for surveilling key locations. They installed cameras to send real-time data to their handlers. This intelligence was intended to plan future terror attacks in India. The operation followed weeks of surveillance. Authorities are analyzing seized devices to find more links.

title: 'BJP to bring UCC in 6 months': Amit Shah pitches common civil law in Bengal
content: UCC is a proposal to have one common set of personal laws for all citizens in India, covering marriage, divorce, inheritance, and adoption, regardless of religion. It aims to ensure equality before law and promote national integration by replacing religion-based personal laws with a uniform legal framework. In the Bengal polls, where BJP strives to wrest power from three-time chief minister Mamata Banerjee, who fiercely opposes the UCC, the issue is expected to highly polarise the elections.

title: RR vs RCB: Sooryavanshi vs Bhuvneshwar, Kohli vs Sandeep - 5 key battles in today's match
content: Table-toppers Rajasthan Royals face defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru in a thrilling IPL clash. Both teams aim to extend their unbeaten streaks. Key player battles, including Virat Kohli vs. Sandeep Sharma and Yashasvi Jaiswal vs. Jacob Duffy, are set to define this high-stakes encounter at Barsapara Cricket Stadium.

title: Sensex up over 900 points - top reasons for market rally
content: Stock market today: Indian equity benchmarks, Sensex and Nifty50, rallied in trade on Friday after a day of losses on Thursday. While Nifty50 went above 24,000, BSE Sensex was up over 1,000 points, crossing the 77,500 mark.

title: Strait of Hormuz: Open or shut? What ceasefire means — FAQs answered
content: A fragile ceasefire has eased immediate escalation risks in the Strait of Hormuz, but shipping remains constrained and conditional. While limited vessel movement has resumed, it's far from normal, with security considerations dictating transit and global energy markets remaining sensitive to any disruptions.

title: Harshit Rana checks into BCCI's Centre of Excellence for rehab after surgery
content: Indian pacer Harshit Rana is making good progress in his recovery following knee surgery on February 9.  Ruled out of the 2026 T20 World Cup and IPL, Rana has joined the BCCI's Centre of Excellence in Bengaluru for rehabilitation. While his knee is healing faster than anticipated, the 24-year-old faces a fitness challenge to regain his optimal form.

title: US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan: Is it happening? Lebanon hurdle puts fragile truce at risk
content: Pakistan is hosting crucial indirect US-Iran talks to stabilize a ceasefire, but Iran's participation hinges on halting Israeli strikes in Lebanon. While Islamabad ramps up security, Tehran denies sending a delegation, citing the Lebanon conflict as a key obstacle.

title: Kerala student who went missing in Karnataka Chandradrona hills found dead
content: A 16-year-old Kerala student, Srinandhana, who went missing during a trip to Karnataka's Chandradrona hills, was found deceased on Friday. She disappeared on Tuesday near Manikyadhara Falls. Authorities conducted an extensive search using thermal drones, CCTV analysis, and call records, involving multiple agencies.

title: 'With deep anguish': What Justice Yashwant wrote in resignation letter to President
content: Justice Yashwant Varma resigned from the Allahabad High Court with immediate effect, citing deep anguish. His resignation follows a cash recovery controversy at his residence and an ongoing impeachment process initiated after a Supreme Court-led inquiry recommended further action.

title: 'Forced into Ukraine war': SC seeks Centre's reply on 26 Indians stranded in Russia
content: The Supreme Court has directed the Union government to respond within a week to a habeas corpus petition concerning 26 Indian nationals allegedly stranded in Russia and forced into the Ukraine war. Families reported their relatives were lured with job promises, had passports seized, and were compelled to join military units. The court's intervention seeks their safe return.

title: Telangana: Man proposes minor for male heir before killing pregnant wife, two daughters
content: Warangal police have solved a shocking triple murder case. A pregnant woman and her two daughters were killed on April 1. Ten people have been arrested, including paramedical staff and a doctor. Two doctors are currently absconding. The main accused confessed to the crime. Investigations revealed a plot involving sex determination and abortion.

title: ‘Gone upstairs for lesser things’: KKR star fumes over umpiring blunder
content: Kolkata Knight Riders all-rounder Rovman Powell cited an umpiring "blunder" and the Eden Gardens pitch as contributing factors to their last-ball defeat against Lucknow Super Giants. Rovman Powell suggested a controversial dismissal of Finn Allen should have been reviewed, while also noting the wicket was not conducive to high scores.

title: Cash recovery row: Justice Yashwant Varma resigns amid impeachment process
content: Justice Yashwant Varma has resigned from his post following a cash recovery controversy and impeachment proceedings. Allegations of unaccounted cash surfaced after a fire at his residence, prompting a Supreme Court inquiry and subsequent parliamentary action. The judge had previously questioned the constitutionality of the inquiry process.

title: ‘Woh aaye, maarke chale gaye’: MP woman spins robbery tale after plotting husband's murder
content: A staged robbery drama in Madhya Pradesh has unraveled into a chilling murder plot. A wife, Priyanka Purohit, allegedly orchestrated her husband Dev Krishna's killing by a contract killer to conceal an affair. Her tearful account of a violent robbery quickly crumbled under police scrutiny, revealing a calculated conspiracy and a troubled marriage.

title: ‘Did nothing wrong’: Threat backlash forces Shreyas' sister to delete viral video
content: Shresta Iyer, sister of India cricketer Shreyas Iyer, removed a viral social media video after receiving threats. She stated her "light-hearted banter" about a washed-out match between PBKS and KKR was misunderstood. Despite clarifying her intent was supportive and not hateful, she deleted the clip to prevent negativity and urged for kindness.

title: IPL winners list from 2008–2025: RCB breaking jinx to CSK's dominance
content: The IPL, a global entertainment powerhouse, has seen 18 thrilling seasons since its 2008 debut. Mumbai Indians and Chennai Super Kings lead with five titles each. The article details every champion and runner-up, highlighting key final performances and the evolution of this premier T20 league.

title: Retired Gujarat Woman Loses Rs 78 Lakh in 10-Day 'Digital Arrest' Scam
content: The ordeal began when the victim received a call from an individual claiming to be from a telecom company.

title: "Pak Will Next Seek Nobel Peace Prize For Hafiz Saeed, Masood Azhar": K Kavitha
content: K Kavitha said Pakistan has been involved in sponsoring terrorism in India for decades and said the country did not deserve to be associated with a prize meant to honour peace

title: US-Israel-Iran War Live: Vance Warns Iran Not To 'Play' The US As He Departs For Negotiations
content: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:  US President Donald Trump agreed to a two-day ceasefire just hours before the deadline he had set for Iran to capitulate, warning that otherwise a "whole civilisation will die tonight."

title: Rs 960-Crore Jal Jeevan Mission Scam: Ex-IAS Officer Sent To 3-Day Remand
content: The retired IAS officer went missing for a long time and a lookout notice had earlier been issued against him.

title: Stuck At 45 Feet: Battle On To Save 3-Year-Old From Ujjain Borewell
content: Rescuers have been pumping in oxygen through pipes. They attempted twice to secure a rope ring around the child's hands and pull him out of the borewell - but failed.

title: 10 Dead, Several Missing After Tourist Boat Overturns In Yamuna In UP's Mathura
content: A local diver, identified as Gulab, said about 15 people have been pulled out so far, officials said.

title: Steel, Glass And Ambition: Noida Airport Preps For 1st Commercial Flight
content: Noida International Airport: The first phase spans 1,334 hectares, with two runways and a terminal designed to handle 12 million passengers annually

title: JD Vance Warns Iran Not To "Play" US As He Leaves For Truce Talks
content: Vance also said that Trump "gave us some pretty clear guidelines" on how talks should go, but he didn't elaborate.

title: 16-Year-Old Andhra Girl's Throat Slit At Home. Killer Knew Her
content: The accused Avula Venkatesh entered the student's house when she was alone and attacked her with a knife.

title: Iran Now Being Run By Revolutionary Guards, Turning Far More Hardline: Israel
content: The surprise attacks on February 28, the first day of the war, killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, and after the ceasefire, Donald Trump claimed that Iran has "gone through what will be a very productive Regime Change!"

title: 42 Maoists Including Top Commander Sodi Keshalu Surrender In Telangana
content: Friday's surrender included senior divisional committee members, area committee leaders, platoon commanders, and cadres from the Maoists' strongest military formation active in the Bastar region and along the Telangana border.

title: US Air Force Jet Approaches Pakistan's Nur Khan Base Ahead Of Talks
content: Uncertainty shroud the talks in Pakistan between the United States and Iran, with no announcement yet on the arrival of negotiators.

title: Five Things To Know About The US-Iran Talks In Islamabad
content: The streets of Islamabad are flooded with armed security personnel in military fatigues, traffic diversions and police checkpoints.

title: Lego-Style Trump Meme Make Rounds Of Internet After Ceasefire Announcement
content: A viral AI-generated video circulated on social media depicts Trump with a flaming backside holding a sign that reads, "VICTORY! I am a loser."

title: In Pakistan's Mediation To End Middle East War, China May Hold The Key
content: Beijing shares close ties with Islamabad and Tehran, and has been Iran's largest trading partner during years of crippling US-led sanctions.

title: "She's Not Bangladesh PM": Smriti Irani On Mamata Banerjee's "Outsider" Rhetoric
content: Smriti Irani launched a strong attack on the Mamata Banerjee government's record on women's safety and governance

title: "Will Let My Work Talk": Raghav Chadha Posts New Video Amid AAP Row
content: The AAP on April 2 removed Raghav Chadha as its deputy leader in the Rajya Sabha and has accused him of shying away from raising his voice against Prime Minister Narendra Modi and the Centre in Parliament and instead engaging in "soft PR".

content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: NBA playoff watch: Only two games left for all 30 teams
content: the most critical game of the night is the Western Conference showdown between the LA Clippers and the Portland Trail Blazers . the team that finishes in ninth will need to win two play-in games to set up a first-round meeting with the Oklahoma City Thunder . OKC has already clinched the top seed in the West .

title: 🏀 WNBA mock draft: New projected No. 1
content: Olivia Miles drops 28 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists as TCU puts away Virginia 79-69 . the college players available in Monday's draft had one last audition in the tournament . in our latest WNBA mock draft, for example, Miles projected as a lottery pick last season when she was eligible age-wise .

title: Ranking the top 50 men's basketball players to enter transfer portal
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players have added their names to the transfer portal . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark . the NCAA enacted rule changes earlier this year that changed the window in all sports .

title: Best shots, moments and more from the second round
content: Rory McIlroy sinks his fourth birdie of the day to move into a share of second place at the Masters. (0:21) The 90th edition of the Masters Tournament continues on Friday. Rory McIlroy  started off his title defense admirably, posting a 5-under par on Thursday to tie with  Sam Burns  on top of the leaderboard.  Xander Schauffele  is a little farther down the leaderboard, posting a 2-under despite a tee shot of his landing in a  spectator's gift bag . They're all back in action on Friday as the tournament continues. Here are the top sights and sounds from the second round of the Masters. Quite the start. Jordan Spieth opens his second round with a birdie.  #themasters   pic.twitter.com/9wh1DU830r Three in a row for Wyndham Clark.  #themasters   pic.twitter.com/lh3BQBJfaT

content: Frank Leboeuf believes Bayern Munich's "sloppiness" allowed real madrid back into the game . it's difficult to take this stance when snide comments about the supposed weakness of the Bundesliga are made by international pundits who frankly should know a lot better .

title: Spring game previews: Alabama, Florida among ones to note Saturday
content: nine power 4 schools hold an event on saturday, April 11 . it's spring game season in the world of college football with four games . a quarterback battle at Alabama between Austin Mack and Keelon Russell .

content: The e-Office system will be shut down from April 10 till April 15 for the roll-out of the latest version, says IT dept. Satheesan says the temporary shift to manual processes reduces transparency and creates the possibility of misuse during a sensitive election period

title: A.P. invites PM Modi to inaugurate Bhogapuram airport
content: Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu extends a formal invitation, proposing dates in early July or mid-August for the inauguration

title: Jharkhand BJP seeks CBI or judicial probe into ₹21 crore treasury scam
content: Party alleges irregular salary withdrawals from police treasuries in Hazaribagh and Bokaro; State Finance Department orders stricter verification of salary bills

title: Assamese daily's office attacked in North Lakhimpur
content: "We have learnt that miscreants attacked the office with stones. Window panes were broken. We have started an investigation, and arrests will be made soon," says police officer

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: DMK has only fulfilled 70 out of 511 poll promises made in 2021, alleges BJP’s K. Annamalai
content: K. Annamalai also aimed at Nilgiris MP, A. Raja, whom he said had been “caught” making disparaging comments about the Chief Minister, which were allegedly posted on a YouTube channel.

title: Kerala polls: Opposing alliances seek to read the political leaves of high voting percentage
content: Notably, leaders of the three alliances signal a perceptible widening of Kerala’s electoral spectrum. They indicate that major alliances are compelled to court vacillating electoral groups of varied caste and religious hues more actively in 2026 compared to past polls

title: Census 2027: demarcation of houselisting blocks  planned in April-end
content: Once HLBs are demarcated, census officials will have a clear idea as to the number of enumerators required for the census exercise planned in July this year with a 15-day self-enumeration period in June

title: Settipalle sees first land registration after decades of controversy
content: The much-needed registration follows the proposal of an ambitious ₹1,766 crore project to develop a township, located 1 km from the newly-formed Tiruchanur railway station, 5 km from the Renigunta railway junction, and 9 km from the Tirupati international airport

title: BJP’s Christian outreach runs into rough weather in Kerala over FCRA Bill
content: P.C. George has claimed that among the candidates in Poonjar, he alone had worked for the Church's benefit

title: Madras HC refuses to direct EC to send confirmation SMS to voters
content: Chief Justice’s Bench says its too late to order implementation of the system during the T.N. Assembly election 2026. It, however, observes that the EC can be directed to consider the possibility for future elections

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: High voter turnout in Kollam sparks hopes for main fronts
content: While the UDF dreams of a clean sweep, the LDF remains confident and the NDA looks toward a historic breakthrough

title: Tourism to be ‘primary economic driver’ of growth: GNI Draft Master Plan
content: Notified for suggestions, plan aims for tourism-led development, targets 3.36 lakh population and one million visitors by 2055.

title: Upgraded HAL Heritage Centre and Aerospace Museum to reopen on April 13
content: The museum showcases state-of-the-art installations, including a life-size replica of the Hindustan Turbo Fan Engine and a 3D anamorphic runway featuring the HAL’s iconic aircraft- Prachand and Tejas, says HAL

title: Krishna district child marriage case registered after wedding photos surface online
content: Child marriage came to light when a family member uploaded the wedding photos on a social media group, say officials

title: 15-year-old missing girl from Kerala found dead in Chikkamagaluru
content: While Chikkamagaluru SP told The Hindu that the body had been traced, and the clothes she was wearing were intact, the victim’s family suspects foul play

title: SC steps in on plea of Indians ‘stuck’ in Russia, ‘forced’ into war with Ukraine
content: “We are stuck in Russia, fighting for a foreign state unwillingly… We could be either dead or injured. We are in an extreme situation”

title: BJP plans outreach before special Parliamentary session on women’s reservation amendments
content: Campaign is to begin from Saturday (April 11, 2026) and will include at least 50 town hall events, with the biggest to be addressed by Prime Minister Narendra Modi

title: MQ-4C Triton: What we know about the mystery of US Navy’s $200m 'missing' drone
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. title: Seeti Movement in Meghalaya: Inside India’s new food collective
content: At its second edition in Shillong, the Seeti Movement — co-founded by Sid Mewara and Priyadarshini Raje Scindia— brought together chefs, creators, and entrepreneurs for curated meals, cultural immersion, and candid conversations on collaboration, fine dining, and the future of India’s F&B industry.

title: Box fitted with two grenades recovered in J&K’s Rajouri, area cordoned off
content: Locals spotted suspicious material in the Thandipani area of the Sunderbani belt, following which security personnel rushed to the spot and secured the area, the officials said.

title: Three held in Bengaluru for mobile phone thefts; one linked to 55 cases
content: The accused have been identified as Sohail Pasha, 37, his brother Saleem Pasha, 34, and his wife Husna Banu, 32, all residents of D.J. Halli and originally from Mysuru

title: ‘MAVIGUN’: YSRCP says Jagan is a ‘mentor’, not a ‘joker’, for proposing cost-effective capital
content: YSRCP spokesperson Sivaprasad Reddy backs Y.S. Jagan Mohan Reddy’s MAVIGUN proposal, criticises NDA and Congress party for opposing alternative to Amaravati

title: How a research scholar’s curiosity about type designing led to a paper on Kerala’s vibrant hand-painted political graffiti
content: Neetha Joseph K, a doctoral scholar at IIT Hyderabad, has documented hand-painted political graffiti in Kerala in a research paper, ‘The Visual Voices of Kerala’s Politics’, which looks at the stylistic variations of the Malayalam fonts across eight districts in the State

title: Marco Rubio’s visit to India announced after U.S. top diplomat’s meeting with Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri
content: Vikram Misri and the U.S. Secretary of State Rubio reviewed bilateral relationships, especially trade, critical minerals, defence and the Quad

title: Fly91 launches Vijayawada-Hyderabad flights; route now served by nine daily services
content: Fly91 begins operations from Vijayawada International Airport on the Hyderabad route; Vijayawada now has nine daily flights on the sector, the AAI said

title: “Let go and accept verdict”: public health expert’s post-election ‘Stoic’ advice for candidates
content: Dr. Ekbal suggests a practical approach to mental well-being of candidates who are in anticipation of outcomes after an intense and exhausting electoral battle

title: Supreme Court declines bail plea of suspended Punjab Police DIG Harcharan Singh Bhullar
content: While dismissing his bail plea, the high court had granted him liberty to apply for bail afresh before the special court after the examination of material witnesses in the case

title: Watch | From gun to governance: Bastar after Maoists
content: Decades of Maoist control in Bastar are unravelling after the killing of top leaders, large‑scale surrenders and an expansive security grid. With camps, roads and basic services reaching once‑cut‑off villages, officials say only a few dozen Maoists remain active, shifting the challenge from counter‑insurgency to delivering long‑pending development.
